etymology.description: ใกญ (jรฌ) is an ancient form of ็นผ (jรฌ, "continue") -> semantic ็ณธ(็ณธ) ("silk; thread") + phonetic ใกญ (jรฌ) = depict continuing a thread -> continuation
etymology.interpretation: The character ใกญ was originally used for its phonetic value in the character ็นผ, where it contributed to the concept of continuing a thread, which aligns with the meaning of continuation.
